name: wxcode-admin-statute-legal
title: Statute Admin
description: Refined warm-white professional admin aesthetic: warm-white canvas (#faf8f6), deep-burgundy accent (#9f1239 / #be123c), gold secondary accent (#b45309), Inter type with tabular figures, and white raised cards with a 3px accent top stripe. Archetype = dark sidebar with entity-switcher grouped nav + sticky topbar with search and period selector + 4 KPI tiles + 2-column grid (records table left, deadline feed + bar chart right) + full-width items list, plus matching list, form, and detail screens. Built for authoritative yet approachable professional service consoles.

query.en: Apply this refined warm-white professional admin aesthetic to my domain — dark sidebar with entity-switcher grouped nav, sticky topbar with search and period selector, 4 KPI tiles with burgundy and gold accent stripes, a records table with status pills, a deadline feed and bar chart side panel, and a full-width documents list, plus list / form / detail screens.
query.zh-CN: 将这个精致温白色专业管理界面风格应用到我的领域：深色侧边栏带实体切换分组导航、顶栏搜索和时段选择器、4 个 KPI 卡片（深红和金色强调色条纹）、带状态标签的记录表格、截止日期动态和横向柱状图侧栏，以及全宽文档列表，并配套列表 / 表单 / 详情页面。

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
